offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, delayed financial reporting causes missed client insights. We automate report generation and distribution instead of manual report generation and email distribution.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try report generation and email scheduling on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as report templates
Allow CSV import for existing client data
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
